displayTitle: The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap
synopsis:
Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi are sent to destroy a Separatist weapons factory. They knock out its shield generator but grow uneasy when the supporting task force fails to attack. Picked up by Master Jyl Somtay, they learn why: an enormous Separatist warship, the *Starcrusher*, has annihilated the Republic fleet. The Jedi Council devises a response, sending Obi-Wan, Ahsoka Tano, Mace Windu, Ki-Adi-Mundi, and Somtay to destroy the *Starcrusher* while Anakin is dispatched on a mission for the Supreme Chancellor.

The ship the Jedi board proves to be a decoy planted by Darth Sidious and programmed to fly straight into the system's sun, a trap meant to kill the Jedi. When Somtay briefly loses faith that they can escape, Mace reminds her that they are Jedi and will find a way, though he admits he does not yet know how. Defying the Chancellor's orders, Anakin arrives to help just as the real *Starcrusher* drops out of hyperspace. He cuts all power to the enemy ship while Obi-Wan magnetizes its hull, dragging both vessels into the sun, and the Jedi escape in space suits found aboard. Back on Coruscant, Somtay apologizes for her doubt, and Mace counsels her to be mindful of her feelings but never let them control her actions.
title: The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap
